data.title: Create versioned JSONL event schema contract for review events
data.description:
## Description

Create plugins/dso/docs/contracts/review-event-schema.md defining the versioned JSONL event schema for review observability events.

Include:
- Schema version field (schema_version: 1)
- Event type enum: review_result, commit_workflow, tier_selection, overlay_trigger
- Common fields: schema_version, event_type, timestamp (ISO8601), session_id, epic_id
- Per-type field definitions with types and required/optional status
- Security constraint: events contain counts and severities only — no finding text or code snippets
- Forward compatibility clause: new fields may be added; consumers must ignore unknown fields

## TDD Requirement

Unit test exemption (criterion 3: static markdown with no conditional logic). Structural-only verification post-creation.

## Files to Modify
- plugins/dso/docs/contracts/review-event-schema.md (create)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Schema contract file exists
  Verify: test -f plugins/dso/docs/contracts/review-event-schema.md
- [ ] Schema defines schema_version
  Verify: grep -q "schema_version" plugins/dso/docs/contracts/review-event-schema.md
- [ ] All 4 event types documented
  Verify: grep -q "review_result" plugins/dso/docs/contracts/review-event-schema.md && grep -q "commit_workflow" plugins/dso/docs/contracts/review-event-schema.md && grep -q "tier_selection" plugins/dso/docs/contracts/review-event-schema.md && grep -q "overlay_trigger" plugins/dso/docs/contracts/review-event-schema.md
- [ ] Security constraint documented
  Verify: grep -qi "counts.*only\|no finding text\|no.*snippet" plugins/dso/docs/contracts/review-event-schema.md
- [ ] Common fields documented
  Verify: grep -q "timestamp" plugins/dso/docs/contracts/review-event-schema.md && grep -q "session_id" plugins/dso/docs/contracts/review-event-schema.md
